description.zh-Hans: 应用CRT扫描线/复古显示效果：水平扫描线、垂直遮罩、荧光辉光和屏幕曲率。
description.en: Applies CRT scanline / retro display effects: horizontal scanlines, vertical shadow mask, phosphor glow, and screen curvature.

triggers.zh-Hans: 扫描线, CRT效果, 复古显示, 扫描线效果, 网格
triggers.en: scanlines, CRT effect, retro display, scan line effect, grid

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 添加CRT扫描线效果，模拟复古显示器的外观。
exampleUsage.en: Add CRT scanlines to simulate a retro monitor look.
